items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5BC125: MiuMiu New MiuWander Bag, featuring imported lambskin with classic brand signature Matelasse texture embroidery, vintage matte hardware. Utilizing curved lines, it retains a playful feel. The bag shape is structured and stylish, full of personality, sweet yet chic. It has ample capacity. Major fashion bloggers almost all own one. Available in many colors: Black, Milky White, Peacock Blue, Sunlight Yellow, Cherry Blossom Pink, Big Red, etc. Size: 23X13X7. Comes with original packaging.

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
💋5BC158#🆕🆕🆕Miu New Arrival, top-grade imported cowhide. The bag features exquisite 3D effect and high-quality texture, reinterpreting the soft charm of this leather bag. The craftsmanship and design blend many of MiuMiu's most unique signature elements. Equipped with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, offering various carrying styles to further enhance fashion appeal and modern style. Inside, it features a cotton satin lining. Size: Length 24CM, Height 11.5CM, Width 7CM💕(Comes with original packaging)
